## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly pipeline review and strategic planning for GrowthX's sales and operations.](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pipeline needs strengthening: Currently averaging 4-5 meetings/week, aiming for 8 kickoffs/month](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Qualification process to be revisited: Some potentially good leads being disqualified](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Marcel's calendar optimization: Adjusting meeting times and blocking calendar for upcoming EPD offsite](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Follow-up process improvements: Implementing strategies to better track and action on introductions and opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

## Topics

### Pipeline Generation Efforts

  - [Current pipeline is light on meetings (4-5 per week)](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Team to meet next week to discuss various pipe gen efforts](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Aim is to achieve 8 kickoffs per month](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Conversion from form submissions to meetings needs improvement](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Considering reverting to previous strategy of allowing all bookings, then de-booking if necessary](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)

### Lead Qualification Process

  - [Current process may be over-indexing on certain criteria, potentially missing good opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Notable examples: Oasis Security (intro from BCE) and other companies with legitimate potential](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Team to revisit disqualification (DQ) definitions, focusing on a combination of traffic, funding, and budget](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Suggestion to look at domain authority and funding regardless of form answers](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

### Upcoming Deals and Follow-ups

  - [Udemy: Contract signed, kickoff pushed to second week of August](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Tavern: Likely for August, facing some internal dynamics](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [RAM: Marcel focusing on this account, navigating complex situation with current contact (Luke)](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Superhuman: Interested in multiple services, team to provide a "menu of options"](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Enable: Progressing well, team working on ROI model for them](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)

### Calendar and Meeting Optimization

  - [Strategy sprint meetings moved to 7 AM Pacific](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [All-hands meeting shifted to Friday 8:30 AM Pacific](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Directors' sync shortened to 30 minutes](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Implementing 15-minute buffers before and after face-to-face meetings](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [Adjusting one-on-ones to fit drive times when possible](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

### Follow-up Process Improvements

  - [Implementing system to track and follow up on introductions and opportunities from networking](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Considering use of shared inbox tool for better collaboration on follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=2300.0)
  - [Exploring ways to leverage LinkedIn connections more effectively](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Move strategy sprint meetings to 7 AM Pacific time](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Shift all-hands meeting to Friday 8:30 AM Pacific](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Revisit lead qualification process to avoid missing good opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Schedule pipeline planning meeting for next week](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Implement new follow-up tracking system for introductions and opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Block Marcel's calendar for the upcoming EPD offsite](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Reschedule non-critical meetings to accommodate offsite and personal commitments](https://fathom.video/share/xM8s6G4iHzykpJriWw9z5YNqFpTgJXZn?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
